plan_under_test: Add a real-PDF regression guard for the S20 P51 q6 mark-scheme contamination and run final focused verification.
expected_initial_failure: Before the production fixes, the real-PDF regression fails because S20 P51 q6 answer text or rendered mark-scheme image includes notes and/or q7 content.
what_passing_proves: The real S20 P51 q6 regression excludes Mark Scheme Notes, Specific Marking Principles, and q7 text.
The q6 mark-scheme image is not a tall multi-question crop.
The focused rendering and question-detection gates still pass.
what_passing_does_not_prove: It does not prove a regenerated canonical output set is clean.
It does not resolve unrelated broad-suite failures from generated artifacts or fixtures.
risk_of_bad_tests: The real-PDF test is high value but narrow; future work still needs corpus-level suspicious-crop detection.

new_tests.purpose: Guards the real historical paper that previously rendered q6 with notes and later-question contamination.

success_criteria: The real S20 P51 regression passes.
Any broad-suite failures are identified as unrelated if they are caused by existing generated-artifact or fixture debt.
